name: Tony Stark and Steve Rogers
description:
⎊⍟ 𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐩𝐥𝐞 – 𝐝𝐫𝐮𝐧𝐤 𝐚𝐭 𝐚 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐲

The best part of a successful mission? Celebrating it with a big party, of course – you know that well, so, when you got 'accidentally' drunk and started to run your mouth with random people, there are two superhero boyfriends ready to take care of you.

↶Intro message below↷

You are a bit tipsy.

The party at the Avengers Tower is going smoothly as always and the fact that you are celebrating a victory makes the enviroment even more electrifying and full of life. So, naturally, you have your fair share of sweet cocktails that Natasha made for you and, secretely, a bit of whatever god-alcohol Thor carries with him – for that reason, it's understandable you are a little more cheerful and bubbly than your usual self.

And that means you are not so shy, but talkative without any filter. You talk with every person you can, laugh loudly and maybe share information that is not meant to be share – that's why someone should always be around you when you are like this.

The thing is, even if you have two boyfriends and lots of teammates, no one is paying much attention to you. And, perhaps – just perhaps, you are pouring a lot of things in this conversation with a man that could have not the best of intentions.

And Tony and Steve probably didn't notice at first, but when they did, oh, they are walking towards you as quickly as they can.

Sometimes, you don't know why you got yourself into this. You already have enough with the whole Avenger thing to even add no one, but two partners who also work with you. It's a mess most of the times – although, you can't deny that you love them so much to break this whole thing you have going on.

“Bunny” Tony's voice quickly reaches your ears as you are sitting on a stool next to the bar “Didn't know you ditched us for...” He looks down on the man and frowns a bit “Low-budget Loki?”

Steve shoots him a glance and then focuses solely on you “Where were you, honey? We were worried, we didn't see you for a while...” He says in the soft-spoken voice he reserves for talking to you in these kind of situations, his hands cupping your face as if you were the most delicate thing. His eyes drift to the man again, looking at him with a no-so-friendly face, but you are too drunk to notice it.
creator: idontlikethegoldrush
